items.q: How much does a storage unit cost at Epic Storage?
items.a: Our published rates are $141.67/mo for a 10×10 (small), $187.50/mo for a 10×15 or 10×17.5 (medium), and $291.67/mo for a 10×20, 10×25, or 10×30 (large). Every unit is climate-controlled. First-month 50% off available with a 4-month minimum stay.

items.q: Do you raise prices after I move in?
items.a: No. That's the whole reason we built Epic Storage. National chains are famous for raising rates 90 days after move-in — we don't. Your published rate is your rate. Any adjustment is communicated in writing, in advance, and never within the first months of your lease. (Final wording is in your signed lease.)

Yes. Every tenant gets a gate code that works 24 hours a day, 365 days a year. Our office is staffed by appointment — call (716) 331-2882 and we'll meet you on site — but once you're moved in, you can come and go any hour you like.

items.q: What unit sizes do you offer?
items.a: 10×10, 10×15, 10×17.5, 10×20, 10×25, and 10×30, plus climate-controlled car bays at 10×20. All units are inside our A building, and all are climate-controlled. See the Units page for size-by-size detail and what fits.

Yes — every unit we rent is climate-controlled. That's unusual for a Western NY facility at these prices, and it's why your furniture, electronics, documents, and vinyl records are going to be fine through a Buffalo winter.

Yes, on select units. A102–A136 (even numbers) are climate-controlled drive-up units on the first floor. A101–A135 (odd numbers) are first-floor climate-controlled units that aren't strictly drive-up but have very easy wheel-in access. Second-floor units (A201–A239) are elevator-served.

Not yet — and we won't tell you we do. What we do have is 24/7 gated access, full perimeter fencing, dusk-to-dawn exterior lighting, and motion-sensor lighting inside the climate-controlled units and common areas. Cameras are on our roadmap but we'd rather be honest with you today than oversell.
Two Western NY locations: 8550 Roll Road in Clarence Center, NY 14032 (our flagship), and 1485 Niagara Street in Buffalo, NY 14213. Both run the same phone number, (716) 331-2882.
By appointment only. Call or email ahead and we'll meet you on site. Gate access for existing tenants is 24/7.

items.q: Do you offer vehicle, boat, or RV storage?
items.a: We offer indoor climate-controlled car bays at 10×20. We don't currently offer uncovered / outdoor vehicle, boat, or RV storage.

We don't require it, but we do offer a third-party tenant insurance option at additional cost. Many homeowners' or renters' policies already extend limited coverage to stored property — check with your agent.
Yes. Use the Make a Payment / Rent Now buttons — you'll be taken to our secure Storable tenant portal where you can rent a unit, pay, or manage your account. Credit card and ACH accepted.

items.q: What's your late fee / grace period?
items.a: 5-day grace period from the rent due date. Late fees apply after that. Full details are in your lease.

items.q: Do you sell boxes and moving supplies?
items.a: Not on site. We kept the focus on clean, secure units rather than a retail store. We'll gladly point you at the best nearby options when you rent.
